coefficients.limitation: The rule is fixed by bundle separation/topographic representation, not by residual fitting.
source_terms: Berger metric compatibility + Hopf fibration connection compatibility
coefficients.symbolic_form: C_HB is not an independent coefficient; vertical-horizontal cross curvature is zero/absorbed by compatibility

coefficients.limitation: Boundary phases remain in V_boundary rather than a new R_bundle coefficient.
coefficients.symbolic_form: represented by the existing boundary operator package

coefficients.limitation: The scalar/topographic proof remains a separate dependency, but no free coefficient is introduced.
coefficients.symbolic_form: represented by the PSD/profile topographic sector

coefficients.limitation: The core mixed channel is represented rather than computed as an independent curvature source.
Mirror exclusion remains downstream, but this coefficient is not free.
coefficients.symbolic_form: represented by chiral projector and P_perp lift package

coefficients.limitation: Sector dependence follows formal sector-labeled boundary data, not mass inputs.
coefficients.symbolic_form: represented by sector boundary functional and K_sector bookkeeping

limitations: The mixed coefficient slots are represented through the v2.11 bundle-separation/topographic-representation rule.
No numerical or residual fit is used to choose coefficients.
title: BHSM v2.10 Mixed Connection Coefficients Report
